result.title: The 6 Essential Ingredients of Loving Relationships | Sara Nasserzadeh | TED
result.description:
How do you build a lifetime of love? After analyzing 450 couples across more than 40 countries, relational psychotherapist Sara Nasserzadeh discovered six essential ingredients for successful relationships (hint: it's not just about sexual chemistry). Learn more about "emergent love" — a new, evidence-based model for fostering the love you desire. (Recorded at TEDNext 2025 on November 10, 2025)

result.title: 1 Thing You Can Do Today to Be Happier | Sonja Lyubomirsky | TED
result.description:
Can anyone become happier? Psychologist Sonja Lyubomirsky studies this question in her lab, doing experiments on "happiness interventions" to see what kinds of actions elicit this sought-after emotion. In a quick talk, she shares the results of her work: a small shift that can change your relationships and put you on the path to happiness. (Created in collaboration with ‪@ignite; Recorded at TEDNext 2025 on November 11, 2025)

result.title: It’s time to make the math start mathing #TEDTalks
result.description: Math isn't just for "math kids" — it's for everyone, says learning expert Shalinee Sharma. She outlines four simple steps to transform your approach to math, creating an environment where any kid can develop a strong mathematical mind.
